title: BookHold
description: A hold / reservation placed by a patron on a Queens Public Library catalog item, to be picked up at a chosen branch. NET-NEW: there is NO owned public API and NO Open Data twin for holds; today a patron places and tracks a hold only inside the login-walled BiblioCommons account (queenslibrary.bibliocommons.com). This schema serves both the read surface (list/get a patron's own holds) and the BookHoldRequest write surface (place a hold — the primary net-new write workflow).

holdId.description: Server-assigned hold identifier. Omit on create; returned on the created resource.

status.description: Hold lifecycle status. Set by QPL/BiblioCommons, not the patron.

itemId.description: Catalog item (BiblioCommons bib) identifier to place the hold on.

title.description: Title of the item, echoed for convenience.

holdsAhead.description: Number of holds ahead of this one.

notificationPreference.description: How the patron wants to be notified when the hold is ready.

suspendUntil.description: Optionally freeze the hold until this date (patron keeps queue position).
